creator: rec@rcousins.com
text:
Stable system booting from 5-disk SATA z2 pool. Recently one disk failed/replaced successfully. Eventually system rebooted (for other reasons) and gives error message "ZFS: zfs_alloc()/zfs_free() mismatch" during "rolling wheel" part of boot followed by hard hang (requires reset/power cycle).

I have tried removing the recently replaced disk with no apparent change.
